text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 60 

GAP_DAYS_LTCP_B_OS 

LABEL: Gap Long Term Care Pharmacy — days in other days’ supply of brand name drugs 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the number of days in an "other" day’s supply of brand name drugs (other than 
1 month) on this tier, when using a long-term care pharmacy (LTCP) during the coverage gap phase of 
the Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME:
